_comment: Copy this file to <slug>.json and fill in your institution details. Slug is what you pass via --institution flag.
name: Example University
_entityID_help: Your institution's SAML entityID. Find it on your library proxy/SSO setup page or by inspecting an OpenAthens redirect URL.
_openathens_org_help: Numeric OpenAthens organisation ID. Visible in the my.openathens.net URL after login or in the OpenAthens admin console.
_idp_kind_help: Form-fill profile. Options: ms_entra | shibboleth_classic | cas | simplesaml | okta | auth0 | manual. 'manual' disables auto-fill (user types credentials in browser).
_credential_env_help: Names of env vars (or .env keys) that hold credentials. Never commit credentials. .env is gitignored.
_publisher_entry_urls_help: {entityID} substituted at runtime. Most publishers accept the OpenAthens entryID as their SAML identifier. If a publisher rejects it, swap in your specific WAYF URL.
